title: SQLancer distinct aggregate with error on group by constant
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, value REAL, group_id INTEGER);
SELECT MIN(value) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_table WHERE group_id = 1) AS distinct_values;
CREATE TABLE another_table (a TEXT, b INTEGER);
INSERT INTO another_table (a, b) VALUES ('test', 1), ('example', NULL), (NULL, 2);
key_bug_features: DISTINCT aggregate with GROUP BY constant
